steps.title: Match the remedy meaning
steps.content: Earlier income-inequality research had a shortcoming: it focused too narrowly on a few countries because data were limited. After gaining access to records from additional regions, researchers could improve or lessen that shortcoming by broadening the data base.

steps.title: Reject unrelated verbs
steps.content: A means propose a theory, but the researchers are addressing a limitation. C means authorize or penalize, neither of which fits the data gap. D means justify or explain away, while the sentence describes correcting the shortcoming, not excusing it. The answer is B.
